data.title: Web3 community verification platform Me3 completes $3 million in financing, with participation from Outlier Ventures and others
data.description: According to Bravenew, the AI-driven Web3 community verification platform Me3 announced the completion of a new round of financing of US$3 million, with participation from Kakao Games, Outlier Ventures, Tokocrypto, Master Ventures, Maven Capital and Marshland. The company aims to use AI models to solve the problem of robots and fake users defrauding rewards in Web3 community platforms such as Discord. The new funds will also support its token issuance plan.

data.title: The U.S. unadjusted CPI annual rate in September was 3%, the highest since January 2025.
data.description: The US unadjusted CPI annual rate in September was 3%, the highest since January 2025, and slightly lower than the market's general expectation of 3.1%. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Social Security Administration Forecasts 2.8% Increase in 2026 Living Costs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market reports indicate that the U.S. Social Security Administration has projected a 2.8% rise in living costs for the year 2026. This forecast reflects anticipated economic adjustments and inflationary trends that may impact the cost of living for American citizens. The prediction is part of the administration's ongoing analysis of economic conditions and their potential effects on social security benefits.

data.title: Thai regulators raid digital identity project World's iris scanning sites
data.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's digital identity project World (formerly Worldcoin) is facing new problems in Thailand, where local authorities raided an iris scanning point allegedly operated by it. The operation was jointly carried out by the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) of Thailand and the Cyber ​​Crime Investigation Bureau (CCIB), targeting scanning points related to the "WLD exchange service." World has 102 such scanning points in Thailand. The Thai SEC and CCIB pointed out that the WLD exchange service provider is suspected of operating without a license and violating local digital asset laws. World stated that WLD tokens are only distributed through identity verification in areas "permitted by law", and eligibility is restricted by factors such as region and age. At the same time, World made it clear that the company is not responsible for the circulation of WLD tokens on third-party platforms (including centralized or decentralized exchanges). (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Potential Emergence of Euro-Denominated Stablecoins Discussed by ECB Official
data.description: According to PANews, European Central Bank (ECB) Governing Council member Joachim Nagel has indicated the potential for stablecoins issued in euros. He also stated that Europe is not lagging behind in the development of a digital euro.

data.title: Tether releases QVAC Genesis I, a synthetic dataset for training AI models, and launches QVAC Workbench, an AI application.
data.description: According to an official blog post, QVAC, the AI ​​research division of Tether Data, launched the QVAC Genesis initiative and released Genesis I, a synthetic dataset. This dataset, containing 41 billion text tokens, will help build smarter and more accurate STEM language models worldwide. These trained models can understand words and their associated logic. Rigorously validated against educational and scientific benchmarks, it demonstrates superior reasoning and problem-solving capabilities in subjects like mathematics and physics. It is the first publicly available synthetic dataset purpose-built and rigorously validated for educational content, addressing the shortage of public training datasets in key STEM fields. QVAC Genesis I aims to empower AI training by empowering the public through open, high-quality data. Additionally, Tether Data released its first consumer app, QVAC Workbench, for AI enthusiasts and others, supporting a variety of large-scale language models. The app is compatible with smartphones (currently Android only, with iOS coming soon) and desktop platforms, offering full native device support. Chat and interaction data remains 100% private, and the "delegated inference" feature bridges the gap between mobile and desktop versions, fully utilizing workstation resources.

data.title: Polymarket CMO Confirms Plans for Token Launch and Airdrop
data.description: Polymarket CMO Matthew Modabber has confirmed plans to launch a native POLY token and airdrop. "There will be a token, there will be an airdrop," Modabber said in an interview on the Degenz Live podcast Thursday. "We could have launched the token at any time, but we wanted to be more thorough. We want it to be a truly useful, long-lasting token that will last forever. That's what we expect of ourselves, and I think what everyone else in this space expects of us." (The Block)

data.title: An early Bitcoin holder deposited another 100 BTC worth $11.1 million to Kraken
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, an early Bitcoin holder (1E2JG...ZRpQ) has deposited another 100 BTC, valued at $11.1 million, into Kraken. Over the past two weeks, this address has deposited a total of 5,303 BTC, valued at $593.67 million, into Coinbase, Binance, and Kraken.

data.title: Infinex founder Kain announced the countdown to the TGE, and the team voluntarily extended the lock-up period by 12 months
data.description: Infinex founder Kain published a blog post announcing that Infinex has officially entered a critical phase leading up to its Token Generation Event (TGE). The team has decided to voluntarily lock up 20% of the total token supply for another 12 months, with a linear release over 12 months after the lockup to ensure liquidity is not acquired before product-market fit is achieved. Kain stated that Infinex currently has approximately $250,000 in revenue and is experiencing accelerating growth, with plans to launch additional products in the medium term. The pre-TGE process will be divided into three phases: first, completing the core product and incentive program; second, evaluating the effectiveness of the product and incentive program to determine whether to launch the TGE; and finally, conducting a presale and token distribution. Infinex plans to launch the incentive program and core features in mid-November. The incentive mechanism will calculate user rankings based on wallet imports, social account linking, and historical trading activity, and will distribute "crates" containing prizes and discounted token subscription vouchers. Some crates will include entries into a prize draw for a $1 million prize pool. Kain revealed that the TGE is expected to take place between late December and early January, and that a presale for "Sonar" (previously, Echo) will be launched before the TGE. All Infinex tokens will be 100% distributed to Patron NFT holders. The plan is to transition Patron NFTs to the PFP series, reducing the total supply to 25,000 to 50,000 through a compositing mechanism. He stated that after the TGE, a token buyback will be initiated, and the company will continue to launch trading terminals, additional chains and assets, an NFT platform, and a new perpetual market. Infinex aims to compete with centralized exchanges and ultimately reach a wider user base.

data.title: U.S. September CPI Data Collection Completed Before Funding Halt
data.description: According to PANews, the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics has announced that the Consumer Price Index (CPI) data for September was collected prior to the suspension of funding. This information was reported by Jinshi News on October 24.

data.title: Mysterious Whale's Profits Exceed $3.5 Million Amid CPI Data Release
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on-chain data reveals that the '100% Win Rate Mysterious Whale' has achieved an overall floating profit exceeding $3.5 million. Despite the release of the Consumer Price Index (CPI) data, the whale's position has remained unchanged, indicating no immediate reaction to the news.

data.title: Trump White House Ballroom $300 Million Renovation Funded by Crypto Companies including Ripple, Tether
data.description: Trump is demolishing the East Wing of the White House to make way for a magnificent ballroom. The president said the $300 million cost will not be borne by taxpayers, but by private donors, including himself. According to the list of donors released by the White House on Thursday, the list includes some of the largest technology companies in the United States, including Amazon, Apple, Google, Meta and Microsoft. Google's YouTube has agreed to pay more than $20 million to the project. The cryptocurrency sector also performed well, with Ripple, Tether America, Coinbase and the Winklevoss brothers (Cameron and Tyler appear on the list separately) all making donations. In addition, defense and telecommunications giants such as Lockheed Martin, Comcast, T-Mobile and Palantir are also on the list. (The Verge)

data.title: JPMorgan to allow institutional clients to use Bitcoin & Ethereum as collateral
data.description:
Delaware-incorporated investment banking giant JPMorgan Chase could soon allow institutional clients to use Bitcoin and Ethereum holdings as collateral for loans by the end of the year, according to a Bloomberg report citing people familiar with the matter. JPMorgan’s upcoming program will reportedly enable clients to pledge Bitcoin and Ether directly as security for loans, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/jpmorgan-allow-bitcoin-eth-as-collateral/
